rag_rules: Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for branching logic
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
Use assign only for implementation contracts with existing outputs or auxiliary variables
Declare auxiliary variables with concrete types (int, real, bool)
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic in AGREE contracts
generic_rules: Use visible identifiers from the current visible identifiers list
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use AGREE scalar declaration types (int, real, bool)
Use eq for auxiliary variables and const for named constants
Use assign for implementation contracts with existing outputs
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL property associations as AGREE expressions
Do not use invalid AGREE type names (integer, boolean)
